_description: Choke point 2 — RAG retrieval quality. CRITICAL: context MUST be list[str].
_note: These metrics derive from Context Relevance per-doc scores. With 1/3 relevant docs, expect Hit Rate≈1 (one relevant found), Retrieval Precision≈0.33, Reciprocal Rank≈1.0 (relevant is first).
context: RAG augments LLMs with retrieved documents.
